hero.headline: DISCIPLINE CREATES STRENGTH
hero.subheadline: CRPF Soldier | Professional Fitness Coach | 8+ Years Experience
hero.quote: "Serving the Nation with Discipline. Transforming Lives through Fitness."

AboutSection.subtitle: THE JOURNEY OF DISCIPLINE
AboutSection.title: FORGED IN SERVICE, PERFECTED IN THE GYM
AboutSection.paragraph1: With over 8 years of relentless dedication to fitness and the unyielding discipline of a CRPF Soldier, I have made it my mission to transform lives. Fitness isn't just about lifting weights; it's about building a mindset that refuses to quit.
AboutSection.paragraph2: My approach combines military precision with advanced exercise science to deliver results that last. Whether your goal is fat loss, muscle gain, or complete body recomposition, we will achieve it together with structured, no-nonsense coaching.

personal_training.title: Personal Training
personal_training.description: 1-on-1 coaching focused on technique, intensity, and guaranteed results.

online_coaching.title: Online Coaching
online_coaching.description: Custom workout and diet plans accessible from anywhere in the world.

weight_loss.title: Weight Loss
weight_loss.description: Sustainable fat loss programs designed to keep the weight off forever.

muscle_gain.title: Muscle Gain
muscle_gain.description: Hypertrophy specific training to build lean, dense muscle mass.

strength_training.title: Strength Training
strength_training.description: Increase your 1RM and overall physical power with compound movements.

body_recomposition.title: Body Recomposition
body_recomposition.description: Lose fat and build muscle simultaneously through precise programming.

competition_prep.title: Competition Prep
competition_prep.description: Rigorous prep protocols for bodybuilding and fitness competitions.

diet_consultation.title: Diet Consultation
diet_consultation.description: Macronutrient-calculated meal plans tailored to your specific goals.
